theme_description: Ship documentation your users will actually read—clear information architecture, instant search, and AI-ready Q&A out of the box. Turn your knowledge base into polished product docs, API guides, and help centers without hand-rolling a separate doc site.

hero_bg_type.label: Hero Background Style
hero_bg_type.info: After selecting the background style, the background color and image will be displayed according to the selected content

hero_image_url.label: Background Image
hero_image_url.info: Background image will be automatically cropped according to page width and background height

hero_bg_color.label: Background Color
hero_bg_color.info: The color of the hero background style will be processed according to the selected color value (color background)

hero_slogan.label: Slogan
hero_slogan.info: Slogan will be displayed above the background image

search_hot_tags.label: Popular Tags
search_hot_tags.info: After setting, the tag list will be displayed below the homepage search bar

search_hot_keywords.label: Popular Searches
search_hot_keywords.info: After setting, popular searches will be displayed below the search box. Use line breaks to set multiple keywords

show_channels_section.label: Navigation Section
show_channels_section.info: If unchecked, this section will not be displayed on the homepage

show_newest_section.label: Latest Articles Section
show_newest_section.info: If unchecked, this section will not be displayed on the homepage

show_topic_channel.label: Featured Topics Section
show_topic_channel.info: If unchecked, this section will not be displayed on the homepage

show_hottest_section.label: Popular Articles Section
show_hottest_section.info: If unchecked, this section will not be displayed on the homepage

faqs.name: FAQ Center
faqs.description: FAQ-style homepage with collapsible questions and category tabs

hero_pc_image_url.label: Hero Background (Desktop)
hero_pc_image_url.info: Recommended size: 1600×400 (or larger, 4:1 ratio) for desktop.

hero_mobile_image_url.label: Hero Background (Mobile)
hero_mobile_image_url.info: Recommended size: 1080×360 (or larger, 3:1 ratio) for mobile. Reserve safe area at top/bottom to avoid covering text.

hero_description.label: Hero Description
hero_description.default: Helping you quickly understand and resolve common questions

support.name: Support Home
support.description: Two-column layout: topics and contact (left), search and popular articles (right)

hero_title.label: Hero Title
hero_title.info: Leave empty to use the site name instead.

hero_subtitle.label: Hero Subtitle
hero_subtitle.info: Optional short text below the title.

hero_height.label: Hero Area Height
hero_height.info: Vertical space reserved above the search box.

show_popular_section.label: Show Popular Articles
show_popular_section.info: Listed by visit count under the search box.

card.name: Card Home
card.description: Large category cards with article previews (Intercom-style)

hero_bg_type.label: Hero Background Style
hero_bg_type.info: Background for the top hero area.

hero_image_url.label: Background Image
hero_image_url.info: Used when image background is selected.

hero_bg_color.label: Background Color
hero_bg_color.info: Used when color background is selected.

hero_slogan.label: Slogan
hero_slogan.default: 👋 What can we help you find?

show_channels_section.label: Show Category Cards
show_channels_section.info: Grid of cards for each top-level section.

articles_per_card.label: Articles per Card
articles_per_card.info: How many child links to show in each card.

show_list.label: Show Sub-page List
show_list.info: If checked, the sub-page list will be displayed on the page

is_topic_channel.label: Is Featured Topic
is_topic_channel.info: If it's a featured topic, the page will be displayed in the featured topics list on the homepage

title.label: Page Title
title.info: Synced from knowledge base, not editable

icon.label: Page Icon
icon.info: Used to display page icon, recommended 1:1 ratio

content.label: Page Content
content.info: Synced from data source, not editable

video.name: Video Template
video.description: Video page template, used for displaying video content

is_video_list.label: Is Video List
is_video_list.info: Video list page, only gets sub-pages with video template; please ensure sub-pages use video template

video_url.label: Video URL
video_url.info: Used for display in video list page, not needed for list page

logo_url.label: Logo Image
logo_url.info: If logo is set, it will be displayed in header, otherwise: website icon + site name

company_name.label: Company Name
company_name.info: Displayed in footer position at bottom of page

header_height.label: Header Height
header_height.info: Height of the sticky top navigation bar. Default: 68px.

header_type.label: Header Style
header_type.info:
* Affects the background and text color of the top navigation bar.
* 0 - Light style with frosted glass appearance.
* 1 - Custom color, please choose background and text color below.

show_card_icon.label: Show Section Icons on Homepage
show_card_icon.info: Recommended to configure icons in page settings

ai_search_completed_text.label: AI Completion Text
ai_search_completed_text.info: Add a sentence after AI completes the answer

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert analytics, customer service bot, etc.

header_menu_html.label: Insert HTML code in top navigation area
header_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
header_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert navigation links to company's other websites

footer_html.label: Insert HTML code in footer area
footer_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code; will completely replace the default footer content
footer_html.placeholder: If you need to keep the default footer content, please insert HTML code in footer_menu_html

footer_menu_html.label: Insert HTML code in bottom area (inside footer, footer_menu_html)
footer_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
footer_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert external navigation links, friendly links, SEO optimization links to company's other websites

features_one_html.label: Insert HTML code in first homepage feature section
features_one_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
features_one_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert navigation links to company's other websites

features_two_html.label: Insert HTML code in second homepage feature section
features_two_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
features_two_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert navigation links to company's other websites

contact_html.label: Contact support (HTML)
contact_html.info: Shown in the Support Home sidebar (e.g. hours, email, chat links).

weixin_app_id.label: Developer ID (AppID)
weixin_app_id.info: WeChat official account/setting and development/development interface management

weixin_enabled.label: Do you want to enable WeChat sharing
weixin_enabled.info:
Provide the ability to share site pages on WeChat
Please configure the IP whitelist (ip: ${service_ip}) in the WeChat official account. After configuration, there will be a period of delay in effectiveness.
Check whether WeChat sharing permission is enabled, WeChat official account/setting and development/development interface management:

weixin_debug.label: Do you want to enable debug prompt
weixin_debug.info: Please only enable this option during the configuration phase; If WeChat sharing is not configured correctly when accessing the front-end site after activation, an error message will be automatically prompted
